microdomains.name: taxonomy_nodes
microdomains.owns: Node definitions, labels, descriptions, node types

microdomains.name: taxonomy_tags
microdomains.owns: Faceted tags, filter dimensions, tag groups

microdomains.name: taxonomy_projections
microdomains.owns: Entity-to-node mappings, multi-path projections, primary path designation

microdomains.name: taxonomy_aliases
microdomains.owns: Alternate labels, search synonyms, industry nomenclature mappings

microdomains.name: taxonomy_navigation_views
microdomains.owns: Role-based browse paths, workflow-optimized navigation trees

no_overlap_assertion: This kernel does not claim material identity, properties, relationships, composition, constraints, context, or lineage truth (Material DNA Kernel). It does not claim chemical interaction truth (Chemistry Kernel), assembly sequence truth (Assembly Kernel), or specification requirement truth (Specification Kernel).
admission_requirements: Taxonomy nodes must reference canonical entities from upstream truth kernels
Taxonomy may not create material truth by creating taxonomy nodes
lineage_policy: Taxonomy structure changes must be versioned. Node additions and removals are append-only events.
projection_policy: Taxonomy projections map upstream truth entities into navigable paths. Projections are derived and read-only. Taxonomy is the source of navigation truth but NOT material truth.
